=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (10:3-10:15) TS377010: `Effect.mapError` expresses the same error-type transformation more directly than `Effect.catch` followed by `Effect.fail`. effect(catchAllToMapError)
  Fix 0: "Disable catchAllToMapError for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable catchAllToMapError for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.mapError"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable catchAllToMapError for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable catchAllToMapError for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.mapError" ===

--- file:///.src/catchAllToMapError_preview.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics *:off
// @effect-diagnostics catchAllToMapError:warning
import { Effect } from "effect"

class WrappedError {
  constructor(readonly cause: unknown) {}
}

export const preview = Effect.fail("boom").pipe(
  Effect.mapError((cause) =>new WrappedError(cause))
)
